concept: Design an arcade game where players control a character that can only interact with objects sharing the same color, which can be switched at will. The game world contains multiple color layers occupying the same space, with platforms, hazards, and collectibles existing in specific color frequencies. Timing color shifts precisely is essential for navigating sequences of differently colored obstacles in rapid succession. Special prism zones temporarily allow interaction with all color frequencies simultaneously, creating safe zones amidst otherwise precise color-switching challenges. The narrative involves restoring vibrancy to a world where colors have been segregated by a regime that believes in chromatic purity.
